description: Accept typed color values, convert supported formats, expose invalid state, and render a contrast-aware preview.
docs: Unreleased canonical source artifact. It does not carry a Stable, published, Quality Passport, or Semantic Sync protection claim.

files.content:
export {
  ColorField,
  colorContrastRatio,
  compositeSrgbColors,
  createSrgbColor,
  formatColorValue,
  hslToSrgb,
  parseColorText,
  relativeLuminance,
  serializeColorValue,
  srgbToHsl,
} from "./color-field";
export type {
  ColorAlphaPolicy,
  ColorFieldMessages,
  ColorFieldProps,
  ColorParseFailureReason,
  ColorParseResult,
  ColorTextFormat,
  HslColorValue,
  SrgbColorValue,
} from "./color-field";

name: color-field
title: Color Field
